run_notes: Full re-run of all six golden-set cases against SKILL.md's Step 2 rubric as updated for the competency-cluster JD-fit mechanism, the recency modifier, and the comp-flexibility guardrail. The five pre-existing cases were re-derived from scratch under the new instructions (not copied from eval/results/2026-07-14.json) specifically to check for regressions - see TESTING.md Test 27 for the case-by-case reasoning. None of the five triggered the recency modifier (no case names a currency-sensitive requirement) or the career-break guardrail (the example CV has no gap), and all five landed on the identical component values as the prior run. Case 6 (Wrenfield Civic Trust) is new, added specifically to exercise the competency-cluster mechanism on a JD whose title shares no keyword overlap with the candidate's evidenced titles.
